creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2011-03-04 13:59:59 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    textproc             Makefile 
  Added files:
    textproc/p5-Unicode-LineBreak Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                  pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Unicode-LineBreak package.
  
  Three main modules and some supporting program files are contained. For
  more details read following POD documentations:
  
      Text::LineFold - Line Folding for Plain Text
      Unicode::GCString - String as Sequence of UAX #29 Grapheme Clusters
      Unicode::LineBreak - UAX #14 Unicode Line Breaking Algorithm
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Unicode-LineBreak/
  
  PR:             ports/154845
  Submitted by:   Olivier Girard <Olivier.Girard at univ-angers.fr>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1521    +1 -0      ports/textproc/Makefile
  1.1       +31 -0     ports/textproc/p5-Unicode-LineBreak/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/textproc/p5-Unicode-LineBreak/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +10 -0     ports/textproc/p5-Unicode-LineBreak/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +19 -0     ports/textproc/p5-Unicode-LineBreak/pkg-plist (new)
